steps.t: Rísti Graver can be found at the Steepset in Máttugard. You should talk to Rísti Graver.
Nakhauga can be found in Deepscrave. You should collect the Jewel of Abnâh from Nakhauga.
The Throne of Zidir-nesad can be found at the Steepset in Máttugard. You should add the Jewel of Abnâh to the Throne of Zidir-nesad under Rísti Graver…
Rísti Graver can be found at Steepset in Máttugard. You should talk to Rísti Graver.
